Book a Call

End-to-End Data & AI Services

From foundational data infrastructure to advanced AI — we deliver across the full data value chain.

Foundational

Data Strategy & Architecture

Enterprise data strategy, target-state architecture, governance frameworks, and roadmap prioritisation — aligned to business outcomes and built for scale.

  • Current-state assessment and target-state vision
  • Data governance and quality standards
  • Phased delivery roadmap with quantified ROI
Explore this service
Core

Data Engineering & Pipelines

Scalable ETL/ELT pipelines, data modelling, automated quality checks, and legacy system migration — built for reliability and performance.

  • Batch and real-time pipeline development
  • Data modelling: dimensional, vault, OBT patterns
  • Automated quality testing and monitoring
Explore this service
Insight

Analytics & Business Intelligence

Executive dashboards, self-service analytics, KPI frameworks, and data literacy programmes — turning data into clarity for every stakeholder.

  • C-suite scorecards and operational dashboards
  • Self-service analytics with governed access
  • KPI frameworks and metric stores
Explore this service
Advanced

AI & Machine Learning

Production ML pipelines, generative AI integration, predictive analytics, and MLOps — moving AI from experiment to enterprise-grade deployment.

  • RAG pipelines and LLM fine-tuning
  • Predictive models for churn, demand, fraud
  • MLOps with automated retraining and drift detection
Explore this service
Platform

Cloud Data Platforms

Cloud data warehouse design, lakehouse architecture, multi-cloud strategy, and platform operations — secure, cost-optimised, and built for the long term.

  • Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Synapse architecture
  • Lakehouse with Delta Lake, Iceberg, Hudi
  • Multi-cloud strategy and cost optimisation
Explore this service

Engagement Models

Project-Based

Fixed-scope, fixed-timeline engagements with clear deliverables. Ideal for well-defined initiatives like a data platform migration or a specific AI model deployment.

Best for: Defined projects with known outcomes and budget parameters.

Retainer / Advisory

Ongoing strategic partnership with dedicated EXD principals on retainer. Continuous guidance, prioritisation, and hands-on delivery across multiple workstreams.

Best for: Organisations building long-term data capability with sustained expert support.

Embedded Team

EXD senior practitioners integrate directly into your teams, adopting your ways of working while bringing specialist expertise you may not have in-house.

Best for: Scaling delivery capacity with senior talent that augments your existing team.

Ready to unlock extraordinary insights?
